goal.summary: MPI-8 Phase 1 and the independent parallel implementation batch are complete and user-verified. The remaining work is focused on platform icon assets, build-hash injection, full Windows/Linux/macOS portable artifacts, updater implementation, and final platform validation.

completed: Runtime portability root/env handling, ffmpeg execFile route, cross-platform open-folder bridge, AUMID, no module-load 7z for custom-node ZIP extraction
Portable staging skeleton, launcher/update templates, connector/update manifest dry-run generation
Release notes, GitHub release checklist, issue template, and PR template gates
pending: Generate media/icons/cubric-vision.ico, media/icons/cubric-vision.icns, and media/icons/cubric-vision.png from assets/mascot/logo.png
Add build-time short commit hash injection and build:<hash> issue labels
Implement full Windows portable staging/build and updater scripts
Implement Linux and macOS portable artifact paths and platform validation disclosures

task_card.title: Portable distribution, updater, and release validation

completed: MPI-8 plan/checklist/validation updated for Phase 1 and parallel batch completion.
Parallel worker/integrator file states marked verified.
Icon asset gap split into a remaining Phase 2 item with source logo path recorded.
pending: Commit from this session should include the handoff and all verified MPI-8 phase/batch files.
After icon/build/artifact work changes component wiring, workspace routing, events, state, or Comfy injection behavior, ask before updating .claude/rules/.

next_action.description: Continue MPI-8 by generating platform icon assets from assets/mascot/logo.png, then move to build-hash injection and full portable artifact implementation.

key_decisions: Portable contract is the source for artifact names, root layout, launcher/update script names, update sources, preserve rules, manifest fields, and platform disclosures.
Vision remains manifest-only for connector scope in v1; no runtime @cubric/connector integration, broker startup, or PromptBox connector controls were added.
extract-zip is now a direct runtime dependency because routes/downloadManager.js lazy-loads it for custom-node ZIP extraction.
CUBRIC_MODELS_ROOT is honored by routes/shared.js so portable model storage follows the launcher contract.
media/icons/ does not exist yet; icon files should be generated from assets/mascot/logo.png.
constraints: Do not add NSIS, DMG, AppImage, or system-wide installer flow for MPI-8.
Do not require Git for user updates; updater scripts should use release assets/manifests.
Do not ask users to manually merge folders; updater scripts own replacement/preservation.
macOS remains maintainer-untested until real validation exists.
Linux generation remains unvalidated unless tested on stronger hardware or by contributors.

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/caf0a30b-e4de-49d6-be05-35e0c83f39d7.json and use mpi-continue to continue MPI-8. The next action is to generate platform icon assets from assets/mascot/logo.png, then continue with build-hash injection and full portable artifact implementation.
